features.title: Real-Time Event Streams
features.description: Consume and publish real-time event streams using Server-Sent Events (SSE) and WebSocket connections. HeadyIO maintains persistent connections with automatic reconnection, back-pressure handling, and sequence-guarantee delivery.

features.title: Webhook Management
features.description: Create, configure, and monitor webhooks with a full management interface. Automatic retry with exponential backoff, dead letter queues for failed deliveries, signature verification, and per-endpoint rate limiting.

features.title: 50+ Connectors
features.description: Pre-built, production-ready connectors for the tools your team already uses: Slack, Discord, GitHub, Notion, Airtable, Zapier, Stripe, Twilio, SendGrid, Google Workspace, HubSpot, Linear, and dozens more.

features.title: SDK Gateway
features.description: A unified SDK gateway abstracting all HeadyIO services behind a single client. Available in JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, and Go. One import, every integration. Full TypeScript types included.

features.title: GraphQL Subscriptions
features.description: Subscribe to live data streams using GraphQL Subscriptions over WebSocket. Schema-typed, introspectable, and compatible with Apollo Client and URQL. Real-time data with the ergonomics of GraphQL.

features.title: Event Replay
features.description: Replay any event stream from any point in history — by timestamp, event ID, or stream offset. Essential for debugging, backfill operations, and disaster recovery scenarios. Configurable retention windows.

features.title: Rate Limiting
features.description: φ-Scaled rate limiting enforced at the edge — protecting your downstream services from traffic spikes while ensuring fair throughput. Configurable per-connector, per-user, and per-organization limits.

features.title: Developer Sandbox
features.description: A fully isolated sandbox environment with mock connectors, synthetic event generators, and webhook testing tools. Build and debug integrations without touching production data or external services.
